meaning: Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol,动态主机配置协议
examples: Be sure the network has a DHCP server on it.
In this article, only DHCP service is covered.
The TiVo had no problem connecting to our network via DHCP and was downloading guide data in no time.
My current company, Nominum, built upon its heritage in high performance DNS and DHCP servers with new analytics technologies that monitor DNS use.
